commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh I am one of them that are peaceable and faithful in Israel: you seek to destroy a city and a mother in Israel: why will you swallow up the inheritance of the LORD. Hebrew, "I am peaceable, faithful in Israel. "(Haydock) I am one of the cities most inclined to peace, and to the king's service, noted for lessons of loyalty. (Calmet) Probably there was an academy here. (Menochius) Mother, city, or metropolis. The Hebrews styled the inferior towns, daughters. (Calmet) Lord, a city belonging to Israel.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
